svg.text: ECO-SIM: Giant Anteater × Termite Mound - Macro-predator Clock
Sustainable foraging & invertebrate regulation | RESEX Recanto das Araras

g.text: Anteater consumes thousands of termites daily
but rarely destroys a mound; it feeds briefly
and moves on, letting defensive soldiers mount
a defense, preventing colony collapse. Creates
a sustainable rotation across the Cerrado.
It dictates invertebrate health of the RESEX.
